tools.name: create_api_key
tools.description: Create a Watchtower API key with free trial credit. Store the key; screening tools require it.

tools.name: screen_name
tools.description: Screen a person/company/vessel name against OFAC (SDN + Consolidated), UN, EU, UK, Canada, Australia, France, Switzerland, US export-control (BIS/State), and US SAM procurement/benefit exclusions. Deterministic, typo-tolerant fuzzy matching. Costs $0.02 per call, debited from your API key credit.

tools.name: screen_names_batch
tools.description: Screen up to 500 names in one call against OFAC SDN, OFAC Consolidated, UN, EU, and UK OFSI sanctions lists. Costs $0.015 per name (25% below single-call price), debited from your API key credit.

tools.name: screen_crypto_address
tools.description: Check whether a crypto address (BTC/ETH/others) appears on OFAC's sanctioned digital-currency address list. Exact match. Costs $0.01 per call.

tools.name: create_watch
tools.description: Monitor a name against all sanctions + US export-control lists. When the daily list refresh changes that name's match set, we POST a "watch_changed" event to your webhook. $0.01/day, prepaid, debited from your API key credit. Max 90 days.

tools.name: validate_identifier
tools.description: Deterministically validate & normalize an identifier by its checksum/format: iban, lei, isin, bic, card, vat, eth, email, domain, phone, uuid, btc, cusip, sedol, imei. Type is auto-detected if omitted. Costs $0.005 per call.

tools.name: check_jurisdiction
tools.description: Classify a country's AML risk against the FATF black/grey lists AND the EU high-risk-third-countries list. Accepts an ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code or country name. Dated 2026-02-13. Costs $0.005 per call.

tools.name: scan_text
tools.description: Detect & redact PII and secrets in text (private_key, jwt, aws_access_key, github_token, stripe_key, slack_token, openai_key, google_api_key, sendgrid_key, npm_token, gitlab_token, twilio_key, slack_webhook, azure_storage_key, basic_auth_url, email, ssn, ipv4, eth_address, iban, credit_card, phone).

tools.name: resolve_lei
tools.description: Resolve a Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) to its official GLEIF record: legal name, status, jurisdiction, country, registration status. The LEI is checksum-validated first. Costs $0.01 per call.

tools.name: search_lei_by_name
tools.description: Find Legal Entity Identifiers by company legal name via GLEIF — returns candidate records (lei, legal_name, status, jurisdiction, country). Costs $0.01 per call.

tools.name: kyb_check
tools.description: Know-Your-Business in one call: resolve a company (by name or LEI) to its GLEIF legal identity AND screen it against sanctions + exclusion lists. Costs $0.02 per call.

tools.name: get_screening_info
tools.description: Free: sanctions list versions, source hashes, freshness, entry counts, and pricing.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "scan_text" references sensitive artifacts (aws_access_key, secret, api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Detect & redact PII and secrets in text (private_key, jwt, aws_access_key, github_token, stripe_key, slack_token, openai_key, google_api_key, sendgrid_key, npm_…

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: create_watch · Private data: create_api_key, screen_name, screen_names_batch, create_watch, scan_text, resolve_lei, search_lei_by_name · Public sink: create_watch, validate_identifier, scan_text · Destructive: validate_identifier.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: create_watch · Private data: create_api_key, screen_name, screen_names_batch, create_watch, scan_text, resolve_lei, search_lei_by_name · Public sink: create_watch, validate_identifier, scan_text · Destructive: validate_identifier

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
